scripts.build: node -e "const { execSync } = require('node:child_process'); const env = { ...process.env, NEXT_PUBLIC_API_BASE_URL: process.env.NEXT_PUBLIC_API_BASE_URL || 'http://localhost:4000/v1' }; execSync('next build', { stdio: 'inherit', env });"
scripts.typecheck: node -e "const { execSync } = require('node:child_process'); const env = { ...process.env, NEXT_PUBLIC_API_BASE_URL: process.env.NEXT_PUBLIC_API_BASE_URL || 'http://localhost:4000/v1' }; execSync('npx next typegen && tsc --noEmit', { stdio: 'inherit', env });"
